# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "networkSecurityGroupName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('nsg-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'nsg'))]"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetID": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
    "subnetRef": "[concat(variables('vnetID'), '/subnets/default')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('networkSecurityGroupName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "rdp",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389-3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "ssh",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22-22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 101,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "http",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80-80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 102,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "https",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443-443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 103,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "networkSecurityGroupID": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
    }
  }
}
